case_title: MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. VS. ANNA IGNATOVA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF RAYMOND A PATENAUDE IN SUPPORT OF AMENDMENT TO PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA  BANK, N.A.
